excerpt: The official programme page for MSc in Systems Engineering and Engineering Management lists 2nd round opening on 2025-09-01 and closing on 2025-12-15. Source: https://www.gs.cuhk.edu.hk/admissions/application-deadline 1st round: 31 October 2025 2nd round: 15 December 2025 3rd round: 15 April 2026 Applications will be processed on a rolling basis until all places have been filled. Therefore, early applications are strongly encouraged.

matchedTextAfter: *Excluding the Postgraduate Certificate in Laws programme offered by the Faculty of Law
